name: discover-issuer-trailing-slash-binds
description: The public discover() caller supplies an issuer spelling with a trailing slash that normalizes away for the fetch URL. Issuer binding is code-point-exact against the ORIGINAL caller string (RFC 8414 §3.3, SPEC.md §16, no normalization), so an AS echoing the trailing-slash issuer binds instead of a false mismatch.
